Footer.description: ShopMart is your one-stop destination for quality products. From fashion to electronics, we bring you the best brands at competitive prices.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.description: Learn how we collect, use, and protect your information.
PrivacyPolicy.paragraph1: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information.
PrivacyPolicy.paragraph2: Information collected is used only to provide services and improve user experience.
PrivacyPolicy.paragraph3: We do not sell personal information to third parties.

TermsOfService.title: Terms of Service
TermsOfService.description: Rules and conditions for using ShopMart.
TermsOfService.item1: Users are responsible for maintaining the security of their accounts and passwords.
TermsOfService.item2: All product information is provided for informational purposes and may be updated without notice.
TermsOfService.item3: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of our services at any time.
TermsOfService.item4: Any unauthorized use of the website or its content is strictly prohibited.

ShippingInfo.title: Shipping Information
ShippingInfo.item1: Orders are processed within 1–2 business days.
ShippingInfo.item3: Shipping times may vary based on location.
ShippingInfo.item4: Tracking information will be provided after shipment.

ReturnsRefunds.title: Returns & Refunds
ReturnsRefunds.item1: Returns are accepted within 14 days of receiving your order.
ReturnsRefunds.item2: Products must be unused and returned in their original condition.
ReturnsRefunds.item3: Refunds are processed after the returned items have been inspected and approved.
ReturnsRefunds.item4: Shipping fees are non-refundable unless the return is due to our error.

HelpCenter.title: Help Center
HelpCenter.question1: How do I place an order?
HelpCenter.answer1: Browse products, add items to your cart, and proceed to checkout to complete your purchase.
HelpCenter.question2: How can I track my order?
HelpCenter.answer2: You can view your order status and history from the Orders page after logging into your account.
HelpCenter.answer3: You can reach us through the Contact Us page or by using the contact information provided.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.description: We're here to help. Feel free to reach out to us with any questions or concerns.
